message:
test(proptest): expand output_format (21→35), orphan_reaper (19→33), recorder_export (21→35) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

output_format: FromStr roundtrip, Display ASCII/no-whitespace, parse edge
cases (empty, numeric), Clone equality, double-parse idempotency,
effective() determinism/distinctness, is_json XOR is_plain for non-Auto,
Debug variant name.

orphan_reaper: JSON schema exactness (4 keys, type checks), error string
preservation, empty errors array, Clone ordering/identity, JSON size
correlation, pretty/compact formatting, Debug length growth, strategy
PID positivity, scanned >= killed_pids.len().

recorder_export: ExportFormat Copy/Debug/Display ASCII, pretty JSON
roundtrip, ExportRequest with T1/T3 sensitivity serde, serde determinism,
Clone/Debug, required_tier T1Standard boundary, no-text always A0,
builder method isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
